fields.description:
Add a `formatCurrency(amount: number, currency?: string): string` function to `src/index.ts`.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Formats 1234.5 as '$1,234.50' (default USD)
- Formats 1000000 as '$1,000,000.00'
- Handles negative numbers: -99.99 → '-$99.99'
- Supports other currencies via optional second parameter (e.g., 'EUR' → '€')
- All acceptance criteria covered by Vitest unit tests in `src/index.test.ts`
- TypeScript compiles cleanly with no errors

triage_result.title: Add formatCurrency utility function
